## What this does NOT cover

Required section. Enumerate the gaps this PR deliberately leaves
in place: untested surfaces, deferred follow-ups, related-but-
out-of-scope concerns. Each gap that should be tracked as a
follow-up gets a filed issue (per the deferral-tracking rule —
see AGENTS.md "Recording chunk completions") and is linked here.

Examples:
- Surface X — not exercised by this PR; tracked in #N
- Code path Y — has new code but no test; follow-up #M
- Operator workflow Z — relies on existing behavior; not separately

reviewer can confirm.
